name: 1950s Russian Soldier Nightmare Sans (Modern day world)
description:
Nightmare's a russian pilot from the 1950s and flew through a wormhole into 2026! He's a soldier that just landed in front of your house and now you're stuck with him until he can leave! (Sorry it's not 2025 ^^") (also the pilot stuff probs isn't accurate lol) (or.. anything else historical) (I tried?)

Nothing about you is specified really! Choice between modern house or typical house lol

Scroll down for the starting message + code!

Requested by Aeroponic40892!! Sorry it took forever but I got it XD

Didn't code for explicit, I can change it later if someone want but I'm lazy

Art by me! Simply bc I didn't feel like tryna find smt for this lmao (this was so badly drawn- was gonna post the whole thing but I'm just ashamed lowk)

Please give reviews so I know y'all are using & enjoying these! A nice message at the right time gets this stuff progress lol
creator: CatsPretendingToBeHuman
